content.en:
Although the Hades Tribe has made a decision, it is not easy to borrow their tribal treasure, the Void Cloak, from the Void Tribe!

The Void Tribe is not weak, although it is weaker than the Hades Saint Tribal, but there is also a supreme strengthening level powerhouse, so it can't be forced.

And the Clothes of Nothingness is a treasure that has been refined, and there is only one tribe of Nothingness at present.

The Void Tribe is a tribe built by the Void Silkworm, which resembles the form of a cicada, and they can give birth to a type of silk in their body.

And with the use of countless silks, it can be woven into clothes and other weapons.

The Void Clothes are made by the Avatar-level Void Silkworm using the silk in its body, and the time it takes is unimaginable.

And a chemical-level powerhouse doesn't dare to spit out too much silk, otherwise it will consume his own origin.

Therefore, the Clothes of Nothingness are very rare, and the Void Tribe will not lend them to other tribes casually.

The Cloak of Nothingness is so powerful that it naturally has unimaginable uses.

First of all, its defense was terrifying, even if it was worn by a half-step Ninefold Ancestor, it could block a blow from the Ninefold Ancestor.

Moreover, once the Void Cloak is worn, it can be hidden, and even the Ninefold Ancestor of the Supreme Rank is difficult to discover.

It is precisely because the Cloak of Nothingness is so special that the Underworld Tribe wants to use this treasure to carry out their plans.

......

Tribe of the Void.

this day.

A figure descended here, attracting the attention of an incarnate-level powerhouse.

But when these avatar-level powerhouses sensed the arrival, their expressions condensed.

"The Great Elder of the Stygian Cloud of the Hades Saint Tribe!"

They didn't dare to stop this dark cloud, after all, the difference in strength between the two sides was too big.

In the entire Void Tribe, only their patriarch, the Illusory Shadow, could stop this Great Elder of the Dark Cloud.

Of course, they didn't panic too much.

They don't think that Styx Cloud is coming to attack the Void Tribe, they really want to attack the Void Tribe, and they won't just come to Styx!

Rumble!!!

The Illusory Patriarch of the Void Tribe has appeared.

"Stygian, what are you doing here with our Void Tribe?" the Void asked.

"Old friend, I'm just coming to see you, let's talk alone?" said Styx.

"Yes!"

The Phantom also guessed that Styx must have something to do with him, so he invited Styx into the Void Tribe and received Styx in his main hall.

Stygian didn't talk much nonsense, and said directly: "Phantom, I want to borrow your tribe's Void Clothes!"

"Don't borrow!"

Phantom said without hesitation.

Although he didn't know what the Void Cloak was going to do, it was the treasure of his own tribe, how could he easily lend it!

And if Stygian Cloud attacks the powerhouses of other tribes with the Void Clothes, the Void Clothes will be exposed, and it may attract enemies for the Void Tribe!

Therefore, he is not willing to borrow the cloak of nothingness!

Stygian Cloud was not surprised at all to see that the Phantom refused, but it would be strange if the Phantom agreed.

So, he continued: "Illusory, our Immortal Tribe borrowed the Void Cloak to go to the Silent Black Sea, so even if you offend the forces of the Silent Black Sea, you don't have to worry about attracting enemies for your Void Tribe. And I personally wear the cloak of nothingness, and there are few strong people in the silent Black Sea who can leave me. Therefore, the Clothes of Nothingness will never be lost!"

"I still don't agree!"

Phantom said.

At this time, Styx took out a treasure, which was a drop of blood-red blood.

"A drop of essence blood of the primordial divine beast, this thing can give one of your clansmen a thirty percent chance of achieving the transformation level, even if it does not become the transformation level, it will inevitably give birth to spiritual wisdom, and the wisdom is no less than the transformation level. How about I use this treasure to lend the Void Cloak of your Void tribe?"

Stygian said.

The Phantom was shocked, he didn't expect Stygian Cloud to come up with such a good thing.

The Primordial Divine Beast is an ancient creature born in the Primordial Ancient Sea before the Endless Years, even before the Primordial Antiquity.

Before the birth of a transformation-level powerhouse, the Primordial Antiquities were snacks and toys for the Primordial Divine Beasts.

However, with the birth of intelligent carousel-level powerhouses one after another, the primordial divine beasts were hunted and killed, and the primordial artifacts also used the essence blood of the primordial divine beasts to give birth to a large number of carnage-level powerhouses.

But in the later stage, the primordial divine beast became extinct, and the essence blood of the primordial divine beast naturally became more and more rare.

A drop of the essence blood of the primordial divine beast is not only useful to the Void Tribe, but also to the Underworld Tribe!

If you're lucky, the Hades Tribe has a chance to give birth to a Avatar-level clansman!

Such a precious thing, the Hades tribe actually used it as a reward to borrow the clothes of nothingness!!

"What the hell is the Hades Tribe going to do?"

The Phantom was curious.

If it weren't for the huge benefits, the Hades Tribe would not have spent such a great price to borrow the Clothes of Nothingness.

To borrow, or not to borrow?

The Phantom pondered for a while, and finally decided to borrow it!

If there is one more Avatar-level clansman, it means a lot to the Void Tribe.

The Void Tribe's incarnate level clansmen were originally relatively small, and it was only with a supreme enhancement like him that the Void Tribe was among the great forces.

Without his presence, the Void Tribe would not be able to become a large tribe, and the number of Avatar-level tribes alone would not necessarily be greater than those medium-sized tribes.

"I agreed!"

Phantom said.

"Hahaha, happy cooperation!"

Stygian laughed.

......

Soon after, Stygian came out of the Void Tribe, already wearing the Void Clothes.

Stygian returned to the Immortal Tribe and headed to the Silent Black Sea.

It was difficult to get to the Silent Black Sea from the Primordial Sea, but there were still a few specific passages that could be easily crossed.

However, Stygian Cloud had infiltrated the Silent Black Sea, and those obvious passages were dominated by the Ninefold Ancestor of the Silent Black Sea, so he would not have passed through those passages.

As a result, Stygian Cloud used an ancient nest in the Silent Black Sea as its coordinates, which belonged to the primordial ancients, so it could be controlled by the Immortal Tribe.

The Burning Origin of the Ancient Hive allows the Stygian Cloud to step into it, thus using the Ancient Lair as a transit into the Silent Black Sea.

......

Silent Black Sea.

"Stepping into this place again, last time it was war, but this time it's going to sneak in!"

Stygian Cloud wanted to come in openly and fight against that group of cultivators.

But thinking of this mission, he was still cautious.

Airplanes!

The dark clouds urged the clothes of nothingness, and the whole person quietly went to the ancient nest of the giant stone in the boundary of the Hanhai District.

And he shuttled along the way, without attracting the attention of any of the Supreme Nine Ancestors.

It didn't take long for him to approach the Boulder Lair!
